hypotheses.name: Residual TF signal after co-expression regression in SV2-4
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512], project to SV2-4 [2039,3]. Compute pairwise SV2-4 Euclidean distances for TRRUST pos (n=589) and neg (n=1523). Compute full-embedding cosine similarity. OLS: regress cos-sim out of distances. Mann-Whitney test on residuals (TRRUST < NEG).
hypotheses.result_value: 1/12 layers significant (L8: rbc=0.083, p=0.0016). Residual rbc range: [-0.170, +0.083].
hypotheses.next_action: Retire SV2-4 regulatory proximity claim. Update paper to reflect that SV2-4 encodes co-expression structure. Explore whether any spectral direction shows regulatory-specific content independent of co-expression.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: Definitively closes iter_0049 H03 regulatory proximity claim.

hypotheses.name: SV1-high genes are depleted of TFs at both L0 and L11
hypotheses.method: Use SV1 loadings [12, 2039] from iter_0049. Split genes into top/bottom 20% at L0 and L11 (n=408 per group). Compute TF fraction (TRRUST TF membership) for each group. Fisher exact test vs rest. 295/2039 nonzero genes have names; analysis on named subset.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Fisher exact OR for TF depletion in high-SV1 group
hypotheses.result_value: L0: OR=0.108, p<0.0001. L11: OR=0.348, p=0.007. High-SV1 genes have 18x (L0) / 3x (L11) lower TF fraction than baseline.
hypotheses.next_action: Check if high-SV1 genes correspond to housekeeping gene sets (GAPDH-class, ribosomal genes). The SV1 axis may capture housekeeping vs regulatory gene dichotomy — test with external housekeeping gene list.

hypotheses.name: 0-dim PH cluster topology for circuit genes in SV2-4 at L8
hypotheses.method: Extract SV2-4 projections of circuit (TF+target, n=295) and matched non-circuit genes at L8. Compute: (1) pairwise distance distributions (KS test), (2) 0-dim PH via single-linkage (KS test on persistence lifetimes), (3) fragmentation integral vs 500-sample bootstrap null.
hypotheses.primary_metric: fragmentation integral ratio (circuit / non-circuit) vs null p-value
hypotheses.result_value: Pairwise dist KS p<1e-6 (circuit tighter). PH persistence KS p=0.0065. Frag ratio=0.940, null p=0.116 (NS).
hypotheses.next_action: Try higher-dim PH (H1 Betti curves) to test for loops/cycles in circuit gene manifold. Or test at L5-L6 where rbc was also notable. Circuit proximity is confirmed but cluster topology is not.
